extra.reason: MessageTimeline had no handler for the app regaining focus/visibility, so the scroll-to-end pinned by useLayoutEffect/ResizeObserver was never re-asserted on return (messages arriving while hidden got scrolled against stale WKWebView geometry; the 96px fuzzy threshold left any sub-threshold offset uncorrected). Added a visibilitychange + window focus listener that re-snaps to the exact bottom, only when isAtEndRef is true so intentional scroll-up is preserved. typecheck clean, 69 tests pass, build clean. Manual scroll verification in-app still recommended.
